conservative.name: Roiling Skies
conservative.requirements:
6 Power
You must be exposed to the open sky

success.description: As above, and your Intelligence is considered to be 1 point higher for purposes of the opposed check

boon.description: Each flying creature suffers to its check to remain aloft

bane.description: You and everyone within medium range of you suffers 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: Only enemies are effected by this spell

success.description: You throw your hands into the air and twist, causing the winds to rage and howl. The target is forced from the sky. If he was at close range from the ground, he suffers 1 wound; at medium range, 2 wounds; at long range, 3 wounds; at extreme range, 4 wounds

boon.description: The landing is especially violent. The target suffers an additional wound and is prone, he will have to spend a manouevre to stand up

bane.description: You and everyone within medium range of you suffers 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: 1 wound inflicted by this spell is critical
